name: Liuzhou Chemical Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Liuzhou Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. produces and sells chemical fertilizers in China. Its principal products include synthetic ammonia, concentrated nitric acid, ammonium nitrate, urea, methanol, hydrogen peroxide, nitro compound fertilizers, industrial formaldehyde, sodium hydrosulfite, and others. The company also exports its products to Vietnam, Indonesia, Malaysia, Europe, the United States, Japan, etc. Liuzhou Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1967 and is based in Liuzhou, China.
